name: Git Worktrees
description: Isolate parallel work in git worktrees so branches don't clobber each other's working state.

commands.description: Manage isolated git worktrees for parallel work
commands.injectPrompt: Apply the git-worktrees skill: use git worktrees to isolate this work in its own directory so it doesn't interfere with the main checkout; clean up the worktree when done.
